name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, flag, turn, N

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ flag = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == /\ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = p
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
        \/ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state[p] = "trying"
          /\ flag[p] = FALSE
          /\ turn[p] = p
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
        \/ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state[p] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES coordinator, participants, messages

Init == /\ coordinator = <<>>
       /\ participants = <<>>
       /\ messages = <<>>


Next == /\ coordinator' = <<>>
       /\ participants' = <<>>
       /\ messages' = <<>>


Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinator, participants, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, THINKING

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Constants *)
THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING == 0, 1, 2

(* Helper functions *)
left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Type OK predicate *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks' = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ state' = [i \in 1..N |-> THINKING]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N:
    \/ (* Pick up forks *)
       /\ state[i] = HUNGRY
       /\ forks[left(i)] = 0
       /\ forks[right(i)] = 0
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left(i)] = i, ![right(i)] = i]
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]
    \/ (* Put down forks *)
       /\ state[i] = EATING
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left(i)] = 0, ![right(i)] = 0]
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]
    \/ (* Think *)
       /\ state[i] = THINKING
       /\ forks' = forks
       /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size, producerBlocked, consumerBlocked

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  \* Queue initialized with zeros
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0
        /\ producerBlocked = FALSE
        /\ consumerBlocked = FALSE

Enqueue(v) == /\ ~producerBlocked
              /\ size < K
              /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = v]
              /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
              /\ size' = size + 1
              /\ producerBlocked' = FALSE
              /\ consumerBlocked' = FALSE
              /\ head' = head

Dequeue == /\ ~consumerBlocked
          /\ size > 0
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]  \* Dequeue by setting to zero
          /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
          /\ size' = size - 1
          /\ producerBlocked' = FALSE
          /\ consumerBlocked' = FALSE
          /\ tail' = tail

BlockProducer == /\ size = K
                /\ producerBlocked' = TRUE
                /\ UNCHANGED <<q, head, tail, size, consumerBlocked>>

BlockConsumer == /\ size = 0
                /\ consumerBlocked' = TRUE
                /\ UNCHANGED <<q, head, tail, size, producerBlocked>>

Next == Enqueue(v) \/ Dequeue \/ BlockProducer \/ BlockConsumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size, producerBlocked, consumerBlocked>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Raft ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == (* pluscal action *)
  \E i \in 1..n :
    \/ (* if i is a candidate, it can start an election *)
       /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
       /\ votedFor' = i
       /\ state' = state
    \/ (* if i is a follower, it can start an election *)
       /\ state[i] = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
       /\ votedFor' = i
       /\ state' = state
    \/ (* if i is a leader, it can stay a leader *)
       /\ state[i] = "Leader"
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
       /\ votedFor' = votedFor
       /\ state' = state
    \/ (* if i is a candidate or follower, it can become a follower *)
       /\ state[i] \in {"Candidate", "Follower"}
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
       /\ votedFor' = votedFor
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Follower"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
      /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == /\ readers' = readers
      /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ readers' = readers - 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      \/ /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Channels, Source, Sink

VARIABLES procState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived

Init == /\ procState = [p \in 1..N |-> IF p = Source THEN "INIT" ELSE "UNINIT"]
        /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
        /\ markerSent = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

Next == 
    \/ \E p \in 1..N: /\ procState[p] = "UNINIT"
                      /\ markerSent[p] = FALSE
                      /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p] = "INIT"]
                      /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
                      /\ channelState' = channelState
                      /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
    \/ \E c \in Channels: /\ procState[Source(c)] = "INIT"
                          /\ markerReceived[c] = FALSE
                          /\ channelState[c] = <<>>
                          /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<"MARKER">>]
                          /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
                          /\ procState' = procState
                          /\ markerSent' = markerSent
    \/ \E c \in Channels: /\ markerReceived[c] = FALSE
                          /\ channelState[c] /= <<>>
                          /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(channelState[c])]
                          /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
                          /\ procState' = procState
                          /\ markerSent' = markerSent
    \/ \E c \in Channels: /\ markerReceived[c] = FALSE
                          /\ channelState[c] /= <<>>
                          /\ channelState[c][1] = "MARKER"
                          /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
                          /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = <<>>]
                          /\ procState' = procState
                          /\ markerSent' = markerSent
    \/ \E p \in 1..N: /\ procState[p] = "INIT"
                      /\ markerSent[p] = TRUE
                      /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p] = "RUNNING"]
                      /\ markerSent' = markerSent
                      /\ channelState' = channelState
                      /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
    \/ \E p \in 1..N: /\ procState[p] = "RUNNING"
                      /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p] = "FINISHED"]
                      /\ markerSent' = markerSent
                      /\ channelState' = channelState
                      /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<procState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

TypeOK == /\ \A p \in 1..N: procState[p] \in {"UNINIT", "INIT", "RUNNING", "FINISHED"}
          /\ \A c \in Channels: channelState[c] \in Seq({"MARKER"})
          /\ \A p \in 1..N: markerSent[p] \in BOOLEAN
          /\ \A c \in 1..Channels: markerReceived[c] \in BOOLEAN

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Msg

VARIABLES token, inbox, outbox, inboxes, outboxes

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ inboxes = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ outboxes = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ inbox = {}
        /\ outbox = {}

Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ inbox' = inbox \cup outboxes[token]
        /\ outboxes' = [outboxes EXCEPT ![token] = {}]
        /\ inboxes' = [inboxes EXCEPT ![token] = inbox]
        /\ inbox \in 1..N
        /\ outbox \in 1..N
        /\ outboxes' = [outboxes EXCEPT ![outbox] = inboxes[outbox]]
        /\ inboxes' = [inboxes EXCEPT ![outbox] = {}]
        /\ inbox' = {}
        /\ outbox' = {}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, inbox, outbox, inboxes, outboxes>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
ASSUME Keys /\ Values /\ Keys # {} /\ Values # {}

VARIABLES store

vars == <<store>>

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE UnreliableFileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS FileSize, ChunkSize, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES file, chunks, sentChunks, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, senderState, receiverState

Init == /\ file = Seq(1..FileSize)
        /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FileSize \div ChunkSize) |-> Seq((i-1)*ChunkSize+1 .. i*ChunkSize)]
        /\ sentChunks = <<Seq>> 
        /\ receivedChunks = <<Seq>> 
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ senderState = "idle"
        /\ receiverState = "idle"

SendChunk == /\ senderState = "idle"
            /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
            /\ senderState' = "sending"
            /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Seq(chunks[1]))
            /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
            /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, receivedChunks, senderState, receiverState>>

ReceiveChunk == /\ receiverState = "idle"
                /\ receiverState' = "receiving"
                /\ receivedChunks' = Append(receivedChunks, Seq(Head(sentChunks)))
                /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, senderState>>

Retransmit == /\ senderState = "sending"
             /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
             /\ senderState' = "sending"
             /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
             /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, receivedChunks, receiverState>>

GiveUp == /\ senderState = "sending"
          /\ retransmitCount >= MAX_RETRIES
          /\ senderState' = "failed"
          /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, receivedChunks, receiverState>>

Next == SendChunk \/ ReceiveChunk \/ Retransmit \/ GiveUp

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, senderState, receiverState>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PetersonsAlgorithm ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
      /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
        /\ flag[2] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ flag' = flag
     \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = 2
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
     \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, U, T, I, U, T, I

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<{}>> 
        /\ infected = <<{}>> 

Next == /\ known' = known 
        /\ infected' = <<>> 
        /\ \E i \in 1..N: 
            /\ infected'[i] = infected[i] \cup known[i] 
            /\ \E j \in 1..N: 
                /\ infected'[j] = known[j] \cup infected[i] 
                /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup known[j]] 
                /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[i] \cup infected[j]] 

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Pages

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = 1..N
       /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
        /\ free' = free \ {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}
        /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> IF c \in Clients /\ c # CHOOSE c \in Clients |-> TRUE
                                            THEN allocated[c]

        \/ /\ free # {}
        /\ free' = free \ {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}
        /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> IF c \in Clients /\ c # CHOOSE c \in Clients |-> TRUE
                                            THEN allocated[c]


Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

        /\ messages = <<>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = <<TRUE, FALSE>>
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = <<FALSE, TRUE>>
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = <<TRUE, TRUE>>
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = <<TRUE, TRUE>>
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = <<TRUE, TRUE>>
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = <<TRUE, TRUE>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == \/ \E n \in Node:
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[m][n] + 1]]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<>>
